phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket counter is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla para comprar entradas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh es-TAH lah tah-KEE-yah PAH-rah kom-PRAR en-TRAH-dahs?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla, situada a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah see-too-AH-dah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, located on the right.

responses.english: At the ticket office, located on the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah see-too-AH-dah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: En la taquilla, situada a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main entrance is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿podría indicarme dónde está la entrada principal?
phrases.pronunciation: dee-SKOOL-peh pohd-RÍ-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh DÓN-deh EHSTÁ LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL

likely_response.local: Por la Puerta de Santiago, en la plaza.
likely_response.pronunciation: POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah DEH sahn-tee-AH-goh EHN LAH PLAH-thah
likely_response.translation_en: The main entrance is facing the square.

responses.english: The main entrance is facing the square.
responses.phonetic: POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah DEH sahn-tee-AH-goh EHN LAH PLAH-thah
responses.french: Por la Puerta de Santiago, en la plaza.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Chapel of the Holy Cross is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde se encuentra la Capilla de la Santa Cruz?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh seh en-kon-TRAH lah kah-PEE-yah deh lah SAHN-tah kroos?

likely_response.local: Tras el altar mayor, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: TRAHS EHL ahl-TAHR mah-YOHR AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: It is in the crossing, right side of altar.

responses.english: It is in the crossing, right side of altar.
responses.phonetic: TRAHS EHL ahl-TAHR mah-YOHR AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Tras el altar mayor, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to join a guided tour
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo puedo reservar una visita guiada?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, KOH-mo pwe-DOH reh-ser-BAR oo-nah vee-SEE-tah gee-AH-dah?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla, solicite la entrada de visita guiada.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah soh-lee-THEE-teh LAH ehnt-RAH-dah DEH bee-SEE-tah g-ee-AH-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, request the guided tour ticket.

responses.english: At the ticket office, request the guided tour ticket.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah soh-lee-THEE-teh LAH ehnt-RAH-dah DEH bee-SEE-tah g-ee-AH-dah
responses.french: En la taquilla, solicite la entrada de visita guiada.
